summary: Backend-only Task 9 validation completed. Comparison helper behavior, summary semantics, and full regression suite are green.
action_items: No blocking fixes required for Task 9 scope.
critical_code_review_comments: Comparison layer reuses evaluator logic correctly: compare_baseline_agents_on_episodes() calls evaluate_core_metrics() and run_episode() directly (no duplicated metric implementation).
Per-episode determinism is explicitly preserved for RandomAgent via _derive_agent_seed(episode_seed, 'random'); repeated runs with same config/episode IDs produce stable outputs.
summarize_by_agent() correctly averages CDL over non-None values only and returns CDL=None when all per-episode CDL values are None.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executed pytest /app/tests/test_comparison_helper.py -v --tb=short (8/8 pass) and full suite pytest /app/tests -v --tb=short (72/72 pass) with JUnit reports in /app/test_reports/pytest/. Verified Task 9 behavioral requirements and summary semantics. No mocked APIs used.
rca of the issue: No defects reproduced in this iteration. Requested Task 9 baseline comparison helper behaviors are validated by focused tests and full-suite regression pass.
